name: Northland
climateSummary: Warm, long growing season, low frost risk in many coastal areas.

name: Auckland
climateSummary: Mild winters, humid summers, good year-round growing potential.

name: Waikato / Bay of Plenty
climateSummary: Productive, mild to moderate frost depending on site, humid in many areas.

name: Gisborne / Hawke's Bay
climateSummary: Warm and often dry, strong summer crop potential, watering important.

name: Wellington / Wairarapa
climateSummary: Wind exposure can be significant; Wairarapa has stronger seasonal extremes.

name: Nelson / Marlborough
climateSummary: Good sunshine, dry summers in many places, watering and mulching important.

name: Canterbury
climateSummary: Cool winters, frost risk important, hot dry summers possible.

name: West Coast
climateSummary: High rainfall, mild temperatures, drainage and fungal management important.

name: Otago
climateSummary: Strong seasonal variation, frost risk important, hot summers possible inland.

name: Southland
climateSummary: Cool climate, shorter warm season, frost-sensitive crops need care.
